title: Shark Tank Latam
description:
Bienvenido a Shark Tank Latam, el canal oficial donde podrás disfrutar de los momentos más emocionantes de Shark Tank México, Shark Tank Colombia y Shark Tank Brasil. Aquí encontrarás todoos los pitches de emprendedores latinoamericanos, negociaciones llenas de tensión, ofertas millonarias y el análisis de los inversionistas más reconocidos de la región.

En cada video, visionarios presentan sus ideas de negocio frente a un panel de tiburones que buscan invertir en las oportunidades más prometedoras. Desde startups tecnológicas y productos innovadores, hasta negocios familiares y propuestas disruptivas, este es el lugar donde los sueños se ponen a prueba y solo los más preparados logran cerrar un trato.

Y sí, la Temporada 10 de Shark Tank México ya está disponible en YouTube, con nuevos episodios todos los lunes y jueves a las 9PM.

Suscríbete y acompáñanos dentro del tanque, donde cada decisión puede cambiar el destino de un negocio.

title: Life With Klee Kai
description:
Copper and Skye are two Alaskan Klee Kai dogs who are small in stature but have big personalities.

Skye, our black and white Alaskan Klee Kai, was born in September 2017, is the older sibling and likes to think she's the boss of the house. Women power!

Her little brother Copper, who is our red and white Alaskan Klee Kai pup, completed our little family in early 2018. He is five months younger than Skye, but they share the same Dad,  who was a red Klee Kai like Copper.

Alaskan Klee Kai is a breed growing in popularity, although we're often asked if Copper and Skye are a Husky puppies, a Chihuahua and Husky mix or Pomsky dogs.

We hope that our channel, Life With Klee Kai, can shed light on our experience with the breed, providing information and plenty of laughs.

In 2025, we launched our new business Daea Well. You can follow our journey with this business on @mendwithendo and @daeawell.

title: The Apawthecary Co.
description:
Simple. Effective. Cozy.

The Apawthecary Co. is a family-owned brand creating handcrafted skin essentials, body care, and cozy home fragrance designed for real homes and everyday routines.

On this channel, you’ll see behind the scenes of how our products are made — from pouring candles and scooping scrubs to blending lotions and packaging orders. We focus on texture, process, and the satisfying details that make handcrafted products feel different.

Our goal is simple: create products that actually work, feel good to use, and bring comfort into your space.

Inspired by the homes we live in and the pets we love, everything is made with intention, care, and a little personality.

Handcrafted. Pawsitive Vibes.
